title: Apply for funding under the Foreign Credential Recognition Program - Innovation and skilled newcomer employment: Contact us - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply for funding under the Foreign Credential Recognition Program - Innovation and skilled newcomer employment: Contact us
From: Employment and Social Development Canada
- 3. How to complete your application
- 5. After you've applied
If you have questions about this application process, send  an email to NC-DGOP-POB-RTCE-FCR-GD2@servicecanada.gc.ca . Questions can be submitted up until Thursday, April 11, 2019, 12:00 p.m. (noon)  Eastern Time.
An information session will be held on Wednesday, March 27,  2019. Interested applicants can participate online or by teleconference. If you  are interested, send an email to NC-DGOP-POB-RTCE-FCR-GD2@servicecanada.gc.ca .  In your email, specify your preferred language (English or French).

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
